headline: CoStar Data Shows Offices Leading UK Investment in Q1 2026
summary: LONDON, May 06, 2026--The office sector attracted the largest share of investment in the first quarter of 2026, according to data from CoStar, a global leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information and analytics in the property markets.
